name: Tim Moore
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $69,057 for Tim Moore in U.S. House, NC-14. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
